message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant "Data Consumer" as Consumer
participant "Data Source" as Source

Consumer ->> Source: 1a. GET [query URL]
Source ->> Consumer: search-response Bundle with new records
    note right of Consumer: (use most recent meta.lastUpdated in filter for subsequent polls)
    Consumer ->> Source: 2b. Empty search-response bundle

alt [No updates]
    Source ->> Consumer: 1b. POST [base query URL] with
    Consumer ->> Source: GET [next URL]
    Source ->> Consumer: search-response with Bundle of next results
    note right of Consumer: (use most recent meta.lastUpdated in filter for subsequent polls)
    Consumer ->> Source: 2a. search-response Bundle with new records
    note right of Consumer: (use most recent meta.lastUpdated in filter for subsequent polls)
    Consumer ->> Source: 2b. Empty search-response bundle
end

@enduml
